info.title: Shejrati Family Tree API
info.description:
RESTful API for managing family trees, members, marriages, and memories. All endpoints require JWT authentication via Supabase.

## Authentication
All API requests require a valid JWT token in the Authorization header:
```
Authorization: Bearer <your-jwt-token>
```

## Rate Limiting
API requests are rate-limited to prevent abuse. Current limits: 100 requests per 30 minutes per user.

## Response Format
All responses follow a consistent format:
```json
{
  "success": true,
  "data": { ... }
}
```

Error responses:
```json
{
  "success": false,
  "error": { "code": "ERROR_CODE", "message": "Description" }
}
```

get.description: List all families for the authenticated user, or get a specific family by ID.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Family ID to retrieve a specific family

delete.description: Delete a family tree and all its related data.

patch.description: Perform special operations like regenerating share token.

parameters.name: expiresInHours
parameters.description: Token expiration time in hours (for regenerateToken)

get.description: Get a specific member by ID or list members by family ID.

parameters.name: familyId
parameters.description: Family ID to list all members

post.description: Create a new family member or batch create multiple members.

delete.description: Delete a single member or batch delete multiple members.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Member ID to delete (for single deletion)

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated member IDs for batch deletion

patch.description: Perform special operations like clearing parent references.

get.description: Get a specific marriage by ID or list marriages by family ID.

parameters.name: familyId
parameters.description: Family ID to list all marriages

post.description: Create a new marriage or upsert (create/update) based on spouse IDs.

parameters.name: upsert
parameters.description: Set to 'true' to upsert instead of create

put.description: Update an existing marriage by ID or by spouse ID.

parameters.name: spouseId
parameters.description: Spouse ID to update all their marriages

parameters.name: isWife
parameters.description: Whether the spouse is wife (for spouseId update)

delete.description: Delete marriage by ID, spouse IDs, or batch delete.

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: Comma-separated marriage IDs for batch deletion

parameters.name: husbandId
parameters.description: Husband ID for deletion by spouses

parameters.name: wifeId
parameters.description: Wife ID for deletion by spouses

get.description: Get memories for a member or family.

parameters.name: memberId
parameters.description: Member ID to get member memories

parameters.name: familyId
parameters.description: Family ID to get family memories

post.description: Create a new member or family memory.

put.description: Update an existing member or family memory.

delete.description: Delete a member or family memory.

get.description: List all edit suggestions for a family tree.

parameters.name: familyId
parameters.description: Family ID to list suggestions for

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: Suggestion ID to get a single suggestion

post.description: Create a new edit suggestion (public - no auth required).

Forbidden.description: Forbidden - Not authorized to access this resource

NotFound.description: Not found - Resource does not exist

example.error: Marriage already exists between these members
